title: Ivanti security advisory (AV26-533)
description: On June 1, 2026, Ivanti published a security advisory to address a vulnerability in the following products:
products: Ivanti Neurons for ITSM (On-Premises)   version 2025.4 and prior
Ivanti Neurons for ITSM (Cloud)   version 2026.1 and prior
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
